narrative:
Waterville City has 4,842 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
